---
title: Risks of exceeding the hourly EU limit value for nitrogen dioxide resulting from increased road transport emissions
  of primary nitrogen dioxide
date: '2007-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- S.D. Beevers
- M.C. Bell
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## Risks of exceeding the hourly EU limit value for nitrogen dioxide resulting from increased road transport emissions of primary nitrogen dioxide

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, S.D. Beevers, M.C. Bell</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2007


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2007-f.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
